titleStmt.title: SII 33.171: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 171. (A.R. No. B 276 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up infront of the Vīrabhadra temple.
This is dated Śaka 1467, Viśvāvasu, Kārttika śu. 11, Monday, corresponding to 1545 A.D., October 16, Friday.

Records the grant of land in Turimiḷa of Ēṟuva-sīma for food offerings and aṁgaraṅgabhōgas to the god Bhīmēśvara by Siṅgarayyadēva Mahārāja, son of Avubhaḷayyadēva Mahārāja of Pāṇem. Turimella is stated to have been given as amaranāyaṅkara to the donor by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Aubhalayyadēva Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1467 Agunēṭi vi
śvāvaśu saṁvvatsara kā¨rttika śu 11 sō .
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrī satāśivarāyalagā
ru vijayanagaramaṁddu pṛtivi sāmrā
jyaṁ sēyucuṁḍḍagānu śrīmajagadārā
dhyulaina śrī turimiḷa bhīmēśvaruniki śrīmaṁnmahā
maṁḍalēśvara pānemarāju Avubhaḷayyadēva
mahārājulagāri kumāḷḷaIna śiṁggara
yyadēvamahārājulagāru daṁḍaṁ
peṭṭi yiccina bhūdāna dha¨rmaśāsana patra
ṁ śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla Avu
bhaḷayyadēva mahārājulagāru mā
Amaranāyaṁkarānaku celiṁcci Iccina
yerva śīmaloni turimiḷagrāmāna
pūrvāṁnnu cellivaccēkṣētraṁ nēmu I tadhātithi
Ayina yēkādaśi puṁṇyakālamaṁddu
dānadhārāpūrvakaṁbbugānu dhāravo
śi yistiṁgāna Ākṣētrānna paṁḍḍina nānā
dhānyāluṁ svāmi Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavāla
kuṁ Amṛtapaḷakuṁ Avadariṁcciḍi Aniyicci
na dānaśāsanapatraṁ . śrī . svadattādvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . sva
dattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēti vaśu
ṁdhara ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi vriṣāyā
jāyatē krimi . śrī śrī śrīn jēyu
Digital edition of SII 33.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
